---
title: "Integrated_Report"
output: html_document
---

# Part 0: Imports

```{r}
# =========================================================
# END-TO-END SCRIPT:
# Cafe 3 Scenario 1 + reporting outputs
# =========================================================

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(janitor)
library(lpSolve)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(purrr)
library(scales)
library(stringr)
```

# Part 1: Functions

```{r}
# =========================================================
# USER SETTINGS
# =========================================================

data_dir <- "../Basic_Data"
output_dir <- "scenario_outputs_cafe3"

dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# =========================================================
# HELPER FUNCTIONS
# =========================================================

safe_mean <- function(x) {
  if (all(is.na(x))) NA_real_ else mean(x, na.rm = TRUE)
}

first_nonmissing <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & x != ""]
  if (length(x) == 0) NA_character_ else x[1]
}

save_plot <- function(plot_obj, filename, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300) {
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(output_dir, filename),
    plot = plot_obj,
    width = width,
    height = height,
    dpi = dpi
  )
}

# =========================================================
# REPORTING FUNCTIONS
# =========================================================

prepare_optimization_metrics <- function(opt_df) {

  required_cols <- c(
    "ingredient",
    "category",
    "expected_lb_meat_portion",
    "conventional_price_lb",
    "sustainable_price_lb",
    "default_sus",
    "conventional_ghg_per_lb",
    "baseline_freq"
  )

  missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(opt_df))
  if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
    stop(paste("Missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
  }

  out <- opt_df %>%
    mutate(
      ingredient = trimws(as.character(ingredient)),
      category = trimws(as.character(category)),
      default_sus_clean = tolower(trimws(as.character(default_sus))),
      baseline_freq = as.numeric(baseline_freq),
      expected_lb_meat_portion = as.numeric(expected_lb_meat_portion),
      conventional_price_lb = as.numeric(conventional_price_lb),
      sustainable_price_lb = as.numeric(sustainable_price_lb),
      conventional_ghg_per_lb = as.numeric(conventional_ghg_per_lb)
    )

  if (any(is.na(out$baseline_freq))) {
    stop("baseline_freq has NA values.")
  }
  if (any(is.na(out$expected_lb_meat_portion))) {
    stop("expected_lb_meat_portion has NA values.")
  }
  if (any(!(out$default_sus_clean %in% c("yes", "no")))) {
    stop("default_sus must contain only Yes/No values.")
  }

  sus_flag <- as.integer(out$default_sus_clean == "yes")

  if (any(sus_flag == 1 & is.na(out$sustainable_price_lb))) {
    stop("Some default-sustainable ingredients are missing sustainable_price_lb.")
  }
  if (any(sus_flag == 0 & is.na(out$conventional_price_lb))) {
    stop("Some default-conventional ingredients are missing conventional_price_lb.")
  }
  if (any(is.na(out$conventional_ghg_per_lb))) {
    stop("conventional_ghg_per_lb has NA values.")
  }

  out %>%
    mutate(
      sus_flag = sus_flag,
      price_lb = case_when(
        sus_flag == 1 ~ sustainable_price_lb,
        sus_flag == 0 ~ conventional_price_lb,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),
      cost_per_appearance = price_lb * expected_lb_meat_portion,
      sus_cost_per_appearance = case_when(
        sus_flag == 1 ~ sustainable_price_lb * expected_lb_meat_portion,
        sus_flag == 0 ~ 0,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),
      conv_cost_per_appearance = case_when(
        sus_flag == 0 ~ conventional_price_lb * expected_lb_meat_portion,
        sus_flag == 1 ~ 0,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),
      ghg_per_appearance = conventional_ghg_per_lb * expected_lb_meat_portion,
      shortened_ingredient = case_when(
        str_detect(ingredient, regex(category, ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
          str_trim(str_remove(ingredient, regex(category, ignore_case = TRUE))),
        TRUE ~ ingredient
      ),
      freq_baseline = baseline_freq
    )
}

add_scenarios_to_data <- function(prepped_df, scenario_list) {

  out <- prepped_df

  for (nm in names(scenario_list)) {
    x <- scenario_list[[nm]]

    if (length(x) != nrow(out)) {
      stop(paste0("Scenario ", nm, " has length ", length(x),
                  " but data has ", nrow(out), " rows."))
    }

    out[[paste0("freq_opt_", nm)]] <- as.numeric(x)
    out[[paste0("delta_", nm)]] <- out[[paste0("freq_opt_", nm)]] - out$freq_baseline

    out[[paste0("opt_cost_contribution_", nm)]] <-
      out[[paste0("freq_opt_", nm)]] * out$cost_per_appearance

    out[[paste0("opt_sus_spend_contribution_", nm)]] <-
      out[[paste0("freq_opt_", nm)]] * out$sus_cost_per_appearance

    out[[paste0("opt_conv_spend_contribution_", nm)]] <-
      out[[paste0("freq_opt_", nm)]] * out$conv_cost_per_appearance

    out[[paste0("opt_ghg_contribution_", nm)]] <-
      out[[paste0("freq_opt_", nm)]] * out$ghg_per_appearance
  }

  out %>%
    mutate(
      baseline_cost_contribution = freq_baseline * cost_per_appearance,
      baseline_sus_spend_contribution = freq_baseline * sus_cost_per_appearance,
      baseline_conv_spend_contribution = freq_baseline * conv_cost_per_appearance,
      baseline_ghg_contribution = freq_baseline * ghg_per_appearance
    )
}

summarize_scenarios <- function(scenario_df, scenario_names) {

  baseline_row <- tibble(
    scenario = "baseline",
    meals = sum(scenario_df$freq_baseline, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_cost = sum(scenario_df$baseline_cost_contribution, na.rm = TRUE),
    sus_spend = sum(scenario_df$baseline_sus_spend_contribution, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_ghg = sum(scenario_df$baseline_ghg_contribution, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      sus_pct = if_else(total_cost > 0, sus_spend / total_cost, NA_real_)
    )

  scenario_rows <- map_dfr(scenario_names, function(nm) {
    tibble(
      scenario = nm,
      meals = sum(scenario_df[[paste0("freq_opt_", nm)]], na.rm = TRUE),
      total_cost = sum(scenario_df[[paste0("opt_cost_contribution_", nm)]], na.rm = TRUE),
      sus_spend = sum(scenario_df[[paste0("opt_sus_spend_contribution_", nm)]], na.rm = TRUE),
      total_ghg = sum(scenario_df[[paste0("opt_ghg_contribution_", nm)]], na.rm = TRUE)
    ) %>%
      mutate(
        sus_pct = if_else(total_cost > 0, sus_spend / total_cost, NA_real_)
      )
  })

  bind_rows(baseline_row, scenario_rows) %>%
    mutate(
      baseline_cost = first(total_cost),
      baseline_sus_spend = first(sus_spend),
      baseline_sus_pct = first(sus_pct),
      baseline_ghg = first(total_ghg),
      cost_pct_change = 100 * (total_cost - baseline_cost) / baseline_cost,
      sus_spend_pct_change = if_else(
        baseline_sus_spend > 0,
        100 * (sus_spend - baseline_sus_spend) / baseline_sus_spend,
        NA_real_
      ),
      sus_pct_pct_change = if_else(
        baseline_sus_pct > 0,
        100 * (sus_pct - baseline_sus_pct) / baseline_sus_pct,
        NA_real_
      ),
      ghg_pct_change = 100 * (total_ghg - baseline_ghg) / baseline_ghg
    ) %>%
    select(
      scenario, meals, total_cost, sus_spend, sus_pct, total_ghg,
      cost_pct_change, sus_spend_pct_change, sus_pct_pct_change, ghg_pct_change
    )
}

summarize_category_frequency <- function(scenario_df, scenario_names) {

  baseline_total_meals <- sum(scenario_df$freq_baseline, na.rm = TRUE)

  map_dfr(scenario_names, function(nm) {

    opt_freq_col <- paste0("freq_opt_", nm)
    opt_total_meals <- sum(scenario_df[[opt_freq_col]], na.rm = TRUE)

    scenario_df %>%
      group_by(category) %>%
      summarise(
        baseline_meals = sum(freq_baseline, na.rm = TRUE),
        optimized_meals = sum(.data[[opt_freq_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        scenario = nm,
        change_meals = optimized_meals - baseline_meals,
        baseline_share = baseline_meals / baseline_total_meals,
        optimized_share = optimized_meals / opt_total_meals,
        pct_change_meals = if_else(
          baseline_meals > 0,
          100 * (optimized_meals - baseline_meals) / baseline_meals,
          NA_real_
        )
      ) %>%
      arrange(desc(optimized_meals))
  })
}

summarize_category_sustainability <- function(scenario_df, scenario_names) {

  map_dfr(scenario_names, function(nm) {

    opt_sus_col  <- paste0("opt_sus_spend_contribution_", nm)
    opt_conv_col <- paste0("opt_conv_spend_contribution_", nm)
    opt_ghg_col  <- paste0("opt_ghg_contribution_", nm)
    opt_cost_col <- paste0("opt_cost_contribution_", nm)

    scenario_df %>%
      group_by(category) %>%
      summarise(
        baseline_sustainable_spend = sum(baseline_sus_spend_contribution, na.rm = TRUE),
        baseline_conventional_spend = sum(baseline_conv_spend_contribution, na.rm = TRUE),
        optimized_sustainable_spend = sum(.data[[opt_sus_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
        optimized_conventional_spend = sum(.data[[opt_conv_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
        baseline_cost = sum(baseline_cost_contribution, na.rm = TRUE),
        optimized_cost = sum(.data[[opt_cost_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
        baseline_ghg = sum(baseline_ghg_contribution, na.rm = TRUE),
        optimized_ghg = sum(.data[[opt_ghg_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      mutate(
        scenario = nm,
        baseline_sus_pct = if_else(
          baseline_cost > 0,
          baseline_sustainable_spend / baseline_cost,
          NA_real_
        ),
        optimized_sus_pct = if_else(
          optimized_cost > 0,
          optimized_sustainable_spend / optimized_cost,
          NA_real_
        ),
        pct_change_sus_spend = if_else(
          baseline_sustainable_spend > 0,
          100 * (optimized_sustainable_spend - baseline_sustainable_spend) / baseline_sustainable_spend,
          NA_real_
        ),
        pct_change_ghg = if_else(
          baseline_ghg > 0,
          100 * (optimized_ghg - baseline_ghg) / baseline_ghg,
          NA_real_
        )
      )
  })
}

make_ingredient_detail_table <- function(scenario_df, scenario_name) {

  scenario_df %>%
    transmute(
      category,
      ingredient,
      shortened_ingredient,
      default_sus,
      freq_baseline,
      freq_optimized = .data[[paste0("freq_opt_", scenario_name)]],
      delta = .data[[paste0("delta_", scenario_name)]],
      baseline_cost_contribution,
      optimized_cost_contribution = .data[[paste0("opt_cost_contribution_", scenario_name)]],
      baseline_sustainable_spend = baseline_sus_spend_contribution,
      optimized_sustainable_spend = .data[[paste0("opt_sus_spend_contribution_", scenario_name)]],
      baseline_ghg = baseline_ghg_contribution,
      optimized_ghg = .data[[paste0("opt_ghg_contribution_", scenario_name)]]
    ) %>%
    arrange(category, desc(abs(delta)), ingredient)
}

plot_category_frequency <- function(category_freq_df, scenario_name) {

  plot_df <- category_freq_df %>%
    filter(scenario == scenario_name) %>%
    select(category, baseline_meals, optimized_meals) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c(baseline_meals, optimized_meals),
      names_to = "version",
      values_to = "meals"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      version = recode(
        version,
        baseline_meals = "Baseline",
        optimized_meals = "Optimized"
      )
    )

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = category, y = meals, fill = version)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge") +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Category Frequency:", scenario_name),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Meals"
    )
}

plot_category_share_change <- function(category_freq_df, scenario_name) {

  plot_df <- category_freq_df %>%
    filter(scenario == scenario_name)

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = reorder(category, pct_change_meals), y = pct_change_meals)) +
    geom_col() +
    coord_flip() +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Percent Change in Meals by Category:", scenario_name),
      x = NULL,
      y = "% Change in meals"
    )
}

plot_sustainability_pct <- function(category_sus_df, scenario_name) {

  plot_df <- category_sus_df %>%
    filter(scenario == scenario_name) %>%
    select(category, baseline_sus_pct, optimized_sus_pct) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c(baseline_sus_pct, optimized_sus_pct),
      names_to = "version",
      values_to = "sus_pct"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      version = recode(
        version,
        baseline_sus_pct = "Baseline",
        optimized_sus_pct = "Optimized"
      )
    )

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = category, y = sus_pct, fill = version)) +
    geom_col(position = "dodge") +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Sustainable Share of Spend by Category:", scenario_name),
      x = NULL,
      y = "% Sustainable"
    )
}

plot_sus_vs_conv_spend <- function(category_sus_df, scenario_name) {

  baseline_long <- category_sus_df %>%
    filter(scenario == scenario_name) %>%
    transmute(
      category,
      version = "Baseline",
      sustainable = baseline_sustainable_spend,
      conventional = baseline_conventional_spend
    )

  optimized_long <- category_sus_df %>%
    filter(scenario == scenario_name) %>%
    transmute(
      category,
      version = "Optimized",
      sustainable = optimized_sustainable_spend,
      conventional = optimized_conventional_spend
    )

  plot_df <- bind_rows(baseline_long, optimized_long) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c(sustainable, conventional),
      names_to = "spend_type",
      values_to = "spend"
    )

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = category, y = spend, fill = spend_type)) +
    geom_col(position = "stack") +
    facet_wrap(~version) +
    theme_bw() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Spend Composition by Category:", scenario_name),
      x = NULL,
      y = "Spend"
    )
}

build_scenario_report_objects <- function(opt_df, scenario_list) {

  prepped <- prepare_optimization_metrics(opt_df)
  scenario_df <- add_scenarios_to_data(prepped, scenario_list)

  scenario_names <- names(scenario_list)

  scenario_summary <- summarize_scenarios(scenario_df, scenario_names)
  category_frequency <- summarize_category_frequency(scenario_df, scenario_names)
  category_sustainability <- summarize_category_sustainability(scenario_df, scenario_names)

  ingredient_details <- set_names(
    map(scenario_names, ~ make_ingredient_detail_table(scenario_df, .x)),
    scenario_names
  )

  plots <- set_names(
    map(scenario_names, function(nm) {
      list(
        category_frequency = plot_category_frequency(category_frequency, nm),
        category_share_change = plot_category_share_change(category_frequency, nm),
        sustainability_pct = plot_sustainability_pct(category_sustainability, nm),
        sus_vs_conv_spend = plot_sus_vs_conv_spend(category_sustainability, nm)
      )
    }),
    scenario_names
  )

  list(
    ingredient_level_data = scenario_df,
    scenario_summary = scenario_summary,
    category_frequency = category_frequency,
    category_sustainability = category_sustainability,
    ingredient_details = ingredient_details,
    plots = plots
  )
}

make_headline_metrics <- function(report_objs, scenario_name) {

  x <- report_objs$scenario_summary %>%
    filter(scenario %in% c("baseline", scenario_name)) %>%
    mutate(
      sus_pct = 100 * sus_pct
    )

  baseline <- x %>% filter(scenario == "baseline")
  scen <- x %>% filter(scenario == scenario_name)

  tibble(
    scenario = scenario_name,
    baseline_cost = baseline$total_cost,
    optimized_cost = scen$total_cost,
    cost_pct_change = scen$cost_pct_change,

    baseline_sus_spend = baseline$sus_spend,
    optimized_sus_spend = scen$sus_spend,
    sus_spend_pct_change = scen$sus_spend_pct_change,

    baseline_sus_pct = baseline$sus_pct,
    optimized_sus_pct = scen$sus_pct,
    sus_pct_pct_change = scen$sus_pct_pct_change,

    baseline_ghg = baseline$total_ghg,
    optimized_ghg = scen$total_ghg,
    ghg_pct_change = scen$ghg_pct_change
  )
}

make_deliverable_category_table <- function(report_objs, scenario_name) {

  report_objs$category_frequency %>%
    filter(scenario == scenario_name) %>%
    transmute(
      Category = category,
      `Baseline % of Meals` = baseline_share,
      `Optimized % of Meals` = optimized_share,
      `% Change` = pct_change_meals
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      `Baseline % of Meals` = percent(`Baseline % of Meals`, accuracy = 0.01),
      `Optimized % of Meals` = percent(`Optimized % of Meals`, accuracy = 0.01),
      `% Change` = ifelse(
        is.na(`% Change`),
        NA_character_,
        paste0(ifelse(`% Change` > 0, "+", ""), round(`% Change`, 2), "%")
      )
    )
}

make_scenario_narrative <- function(report_objs, scenario_name, dining_name = "Cafe 3") {

  s <- report_objs$scenario_summary %>%
    filter(scenario %in% c("baseline", scenario_name))

  baseline <- s %>% filter(scenario == "baseline")
  scen <- s %>% filter(scenario == scenario_name)

  cat_tbl <- report_objs$category_frequency %>%
    filter(scenario == scenario_name) %>%
    arrange(desc(abs(pct_change_meals)))

  biggest_increase <- cat_tbl %>% filter(pct_change_meals == max(pct_change_meals, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% slice(1)
  biggest_decrease <- cat_tbl %>% filter(pct_change_meals == min(pct_change_meals, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% slice(1)

  paste0(
    scenario_name, " for ", dining_name,
    " achieves a ", round(abs(scen$cost_pct_change), 1), "% cost reduction relative to baseline ",
    "while increasing sustainable spend from ",
    round(100 * baseline$sus_pct, 1), "% to ",
    round(100 * scen$sus_pct, 1), "% of total spend. ",
    "Total greenhouse gas equivalents change by ",
    round(scen$ghg_pct_change, 1), "%. ",
    "The largest category increase is ", biggest_increase$category,
    " (", round(biggest_increase$pct_change_meals, 1), "%), while the largest decrease is ",
    biggest_decrease$category, " (", round(biggest_decrease$pct_change_meals, 1), "%)."
  )
}

```


# Part 2: Data import

```{r}
# =========================================================
# READ + CLEAN RAW DATA
# =========================================================

meals <- read.csv(file.path(data_dir, "F25_Sp26_meals.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names()

ingredient_prices <- read.csv(file.path(data_dir, "Ingredient_prices.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names()

ghg_equivalents <- read.csv(file.path(data_dir, "GHG_equivalents.csv"), stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  clean_names()

meals <- meals %>%
  mutate(
    dining_hall = trimws(dining_hall),
    ingredient = trimws(ingredient),
    category = trimws(category),
    planned_portions = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", planned_portions)),
    percent_meat = as.numeric(percent_meat),
    meat_price_per_dish = as.numeric(meat_price_per_dish),
    expected_lb_meat_portion = as.numeric(expected_lb_meat_portion),
    oz_meat_per_dish = as.numeric(oz_meat_per_dish),
    portion_size_oz = as.numeric(portion_size_oz),
    planned_weight_lbs = as.numeric(planned_weight_lbs),
    cost_recipe_per_portion = as.numeric(cost_recipe_per_portion)
  )

ingredient_prices <- ingredient_prices %>%
  mutate(
    ingredient = trimws(ingredient),
    category = trimws(category),
    conventional_price_lb = as.numeric(conventional_price_lb),
    sustainable_price_lb = as.numeric(sustainable_price_lb),
    default_sus = trimws(default_sus)
  )

ghg_equivalents <- ghg_equivalents %>%
  mutate(
    meat_type = trimws(meat_type),
    c_footprint_kg_c_per_kg_food = as.numeric(c_footprint_kg_c_per_kg_food)
  )

# =========================================================
# BUILD optimization_data_cafe3
# =========================================================

meals_cafe3 <- meals %>%
  filter(dining_hall == "C3")

ingredient_summary_cafe3 <- meals_cafe3 %>%
  filter(!is.na(ingredient), ingredient != "") %>%
  group_by(ingredient) %>%
  summarise(
    baseline_freq = n(),
    percent_dish_meat = safe_mean(percent_meat),
    meat_price_per_dish = safe_mean(meat_price_per_dish),
    expected_lb_meat_portion = safe_mean(expected_lb_meat_portion),
    oz_meat_per_dish = safe_mean(oz_meat_per_dish),
    portion_size_oz = safe_mean(portion_size_oz),
    expected_portions = safe_mean(planned_portions),
    planned_weight_lbs = safe_mean(planned_weight_lbs),
    cost_recipe_per_portion = safe_mean(cost_recipe_per_portion),
    category_meals = first_nonmissing(category),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ingredient_lookup <- ingredient_prices %>%
  distinct(ingredient, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  transmute(
    ingredient,
    category_prices = category,
    conventional_price_lb,
    sustainable_price_lb,
    default_sus
  )

ghg_lookup <- ghg_equivalents %>%
  distinct(meat_type, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  transmute(
    category = meat_type,
    conventional_ghg_per_lb = c_footprint_kg_c_per_kg_food
  )

optimization_data_cafe3 <- ingredient_summary_cafe3 %>%
  left_join(ingredient_lookup, by = "ingredient") %>%
  mutate(
    category = coalesce(category_prices, category_meals)
  ) %>%
  left_join(ghg_lookup, by = "category") %>%
  select(
    ingredient,
    category,
    percent_dish_meat,
    meat_price_per_dish,
    expected_lb_meat_portion,
    oz_meat_per_dish,
    conventional_price_lb,
    sustainable_price_lb,
    default_sus,
    portion_size_oz,
    expected_portions,
    planned_weight_lbs,
    cost_recipe_per_portion,
    conventional_ghg_per_lb,
    baseline_freq
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    baseline_freq = as.numeric(baseline_freq)
  )

optimization_data_cafe3 <- optimization_data_cafe3 %>%
  mutate(default_sus_clean = tolower(trimws(default_sus)))

diagnostic_missing <- optimization_data_cafe3 %>%
  filter(
    is.na(expected_lb_meat_portion) |
      is.na(default_sus_clean) |
      is.na(conventional_ghg_per_lb) |
      (default_sus_clean == "yes" & is.na(sustainable_price_lb)) |
      (default_sus_clean == "no"  & is.na(conventional_price_lb)) |
      !(default_sus_clean %in% c("yes", "no"))
  )

if (nrow(diagnostic_missing) > 0) {
  print(diagnostic_missing %>%
          select(
            ingredient, category, default_sus,
            expected_lb_meat_portion,
            conventional_price_lb, sustainable_price_lb,
            conventional_ghg_per_lb, baseline_freq
          ))
  stop("optimization_data_cafe3 has missing values in fields actually required for optimization.")
}

```

# Part 3: Solver

```{r}
# =========================================================
# SOLVER: lock in cost reduction, then maximize sustainability,
# then minimize GHG
# =========================================================

solve_scenario_cost_then_sus_then_ghg <- function(
    opt_df,
    cost_reduction_target = 0.07,
    lower_multiplier = 0.5,
    upper_multiplier = 1.5,
    scenario_name = "s6_cafe3"
) {

  x0 <- opt_df$baseline_freq
  n  <- nrow(opt_df)

  meals_served <- sum(x0)

  lower <- ceiling(x0 * lower_multiplier)
  upper <- floor(x0 * upper_multiplier)

  default_sus_clean <- tolower(trimws(as.character(opt_df$default_sus)))
  sus_flag <- as.integer(default_sus_clean == "yes")
  portion_lb <- opt_df$expected_lb_meat_portion

  price_lb <- dplyr::case_when(
    sus_flag == 1 ~ opt_df$sustainable_price_lb,
    sus_flag == 0 ~ opt_df$conventional_price_lb,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )

  cost_per_appearance <- price_lb * portion_lb

  sus_cost_per_appearance <- dplyr::case_when(
    sus_flag == 1 ~ opt_df$sustainable_price_lb * portion_lb,
    sus_flag == 0 ~ 0,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )

  ghg_per_appearance <- opt_df$conventional_ghg_per_lb * portion_lb

  baseline_cost <- sum(cost_per_appearance * x0)
  baseline_sus  <- sum(sus_cost_per_appearance * x0)
  baseline_ghg  <- sum(ghg_per_appearance * x0)

  cost_cap <- baseline_cost * (1 - cost_reduction_target)

  # -------------------------
  # Base constraints:
  # total meals fixed + lower/upper bounds
  # -------------------------
  A <- matrix(1, nrow = 1, ncol = n)
  dir <- "="
  rhs <- meals_served

  A <- rbind(A, diag(n))
  dir <- c(dir, rep(">=", n))
  rhs <- c(rhs, lower)

  idx <- which(!is.na(upper))
  A <- rbind(A, diag(n)[idx, , drop = FALSE])
  dir <- c(dir, rep("<=", length(idx)))
  rhs <- c(rhs, upper[idx])

  # -------------------------
  # Add cost cap
  # -------------------------
  A_cost <- rbind(A, cost_per_appearance)
  dir_cost <- c(dir, "<=")
  rhs_cost <- c(rhs, cost_cap)

  A_cost_num <- matrix(as.numeric(A_cost), nrow = nrow(A_cost), ncol = ncol(A_cost))
  rhs_cost_num <- as.numeric(rhs_cost)
  dir_cost_chr <- as.character(dir_cost)

  # =========================================================
  # Stage 1: maximize sustainable spend subject to cost cap
  # =========================================================
  sol_stage2 <- lp(
    direction = "max",
    objective.in = as.numeric(sus_cost_per_appearance),
    const.mat = A_cost_num,
    const.dir = dir_cost_chr,
    const.rhs = rhs_cost_num,
    all.int = TRUE
  )

  if (sol_stage2$status != 0) {
    stop(paste0(scenario_name, ": infeasible at sustainability-max stage under cost cap."))
  }

  x_stage2 <- sol_stage2$solution
  max_sus <- sum(sus_cost_per_appearance * x_stage2)

  # =========================================================
  # Stage 2: minimize GHG while holding:
  # - meals fixed
  # - lower/upper bounds
  # - cost <= cap
  # - sustainable spend >= max_sus
  # =========================================================
  A_final <- rbind(A_cost, sus_cost_per_appearance)
  dir_final <- c(dir_cost, ">=")
  rhs_final <- c(rhs_cost, max_sus)

  A_final_num <- matrix(as.numeric(A_final), nrow = nrow(A_final), ncol = ncol(A_final))
  rhs_final_num <- as.numeric(rhs_final)
  dir_final_chr <- as.character(dir_final)

  sol_stage3 <- lp(
    direction = "min",
    objective.in = as.numeric(ghg_per_appearance),
    const.mat = A_final_num,
    const.dir = dir_final_chr,
    const.rhs = rhs_final_num,
    all.int = TRUE
  )

  if (sol_stage3$status != 0) {
    stop(paste0(scenario_name, ": infeasible at GHG-min stage after sustainability max."))
  }

  x_final <- sol_stage3$solution

  list(
    scenario_name = scenario_name,
    solution = x_final,
    baseline_cost = baseline_cost,
    baseline_sus = baseline_sus,
    baseline_ghg = baseline_ghg,
    cost_cap = cost_cap,
    max_sus = max_sus
  )
}
```


# Part 4: Scenarios

```{r}
# =========================================================
# RUN SCENARIO s6_cafe3
# Lock in 7% cost reduction, then maximize sustainability,
# then minimize GHG
# =========================================================

s6_result <- solve_scenario_cost_then_sus_then_ghg(
  opt_df = optimization_data_cafe3,
  cost_reduction_target = 0.07,
  lower_multiplier = 0.5,
  upper_multiplier = 1.5,
  scenario_name = "s6_cafe3"
)

x_s6_cafe3 <- s6_result$solution
```



```{r}
# =========================================================
# RUN SCENARIO s1_cafe3
# Max cost reduction while holding sustainable spend >= baseline
# =========================================================

opt <- optimization_data_cafe3

x0 <- opt$baseline_freq
n  <- nrow(opt)

meals_served <- sum(x0)

# Bounds: up to 50% reduction / 50% increase
reduction <- 0.5
lower <- ceiling(x0 * reduction)

max_multiplier <- 1.5
upper <- floor(x0 * max_multiplier)

required_cols <- c(
  "expected_lb_meat_portion",
  "conventional_price_lb",
  "sustainable_price_lb",
  "default_sus",
  "conventional_ghg_per_lb",
  "baseline_freq"
)

missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(opt))
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
}

if (any(is.na(opt$expected_lb_meat_portion))) {
  stop("expected_lb_meat_portion has NA values in optimization_data_cafe3.")
}
if (any(opt$expected_lb_meat_portion < 0)) {
  stop("expected_lb_meat_portion has negative values in optimization_data_cafe3.")
}
if (any(is.na(opt$default_sus))) {
  stop("default_sus has NA values in optimization_data_cafe3.")
}
if (any(is.na(opt$conventional_ghg_per_lb))) {
  stop("conventional_ghg_per_lb has NA values in optimization_data_cafe3.")
}

default_sus_clean <- tolower(trimws(as.character(opt$default_sus)))

if (any(!(default_sus_clean %in% c("yes", "no")))) {
  stop("default_sus contains values other than Yes/No.")
}

sus_flag <- as.integer(default_sus_clean == "yes")
portion_lb <- opt$expected_lb_meat_portion

if (any(sus_flag == 1 & is.na(opt$sustainable_price_lb))) {
  stop("Some default-sustainable ingredients are missing sustainable_price_lb.")
}
if (any(sus_flag == 0 & is.na(opt$conventional_price_lb))) {
  stop("Some default-conventional ingredients are missing conventional_price_lb.")
}

price_lb <- dplyr::case_when(
  sus_flag == 1 ~ opt$sustainable_price_lb,
  sus_flag == 0 ~ opt$conventional_price_lb,
  TRUE ~ NA_real_
)

cost_per_appearance <- price_lb * portion_lb

sus_cost_per_appearance <- dplyr::case_when(
  sus_flag == 1 ~ opt$sustainable_price_lb * portion_lb,
  sus_flag == 0 ~ 0,
  TRUE ~ NA_real_
)

ghg_per_appearance <- opt$conventional_ghg_per_lb * portion_lb

if (any(is.na(x0) | is.nan(x0) | is.infinite(x0))) {
  stop("baseline_freq contains NA/NaN/Inf.")
}
if (any(is.na(lower) | is.nan(lower) | is.infinite(lower))) {
  stop("lower contains NA/NaN/Inf.")
}
if (any(is.na(upper) | is.nan(upper) | is.infinite(upper))) {
  stop("upper contains NA/NaN/Inf.")
}
if (any(is.na(cost_per_appearance) | is.nan(cost_per_appearance) | is.infinite(cost_per_appearance))) {
  stop("cost_per_appearance contains NA/NaN/Inf.")
}
if (any(is.na(sus_cost_per_appearance) | is.nan(sus_cost_per_appearance) | is.infinite(sus_cost_per_appearance))) {
  stop("sus_cost_per_appearance contains NA/NaN/Inf.")
}
if (any(is.na(ghg_per_appearance) | is.nan(ghg_per_appearance) | is.infinite(ghg_per_appearance))) {
  stop("ghg_per_appearance contains NA/NaN/Inf.")
}

baseline_cost <- sum(cost_per_appearance * x0)
baseline_sus  <- sum(sus_cost_per_appearance * x0)
baseline_ghg  <- sum(ghg_per_appearance * x0)

A <- matrix(1, nrow = 1, ncol = n)
dir <- "="
rhs <- meals_served

A <- rbind(A, diag(n))
dir <- c(dir, rep(">=", n))
rhs <- c(rhs, lower)

if (any(!is.na(upper))) {
  idx <- which(!is.na(upper))
  A <- rbind(A, diag(n)[idx, , drop = FALSE])
  dir <- c(dir, rep("<=", length(idx)))
  rhs <- c(rhs, upper[idx])
}

A_sus   <- rbind(A, sus_cost_per_appearance)
dir_sus <- c(dir, ">=")
rhs_sus <- c(rhs, baseline_sus)

A_sus_num <- matrix(
  as.numeric(A_sus),
  nrow = nrow(A_sus),
  ncol = ncol(A_sus)
)

rhs_sus_num <- as.numeric(rhs_sus)
dir_sus_chr <- as.character(dir_sus)
objective_cost <- as.numeric(cost_per_appearance)

if (any(is.na(A_sus_num) | is.nan(A_sus_num) | is.infinite(A_sus_num))) {
  stop("A_sus_num contains NA/NaN/Inf.")
}
if (any(is.na(rhs_sus_num) | is.nan(rhs_sus_num) | is.infinite(rhs_sus_num))) {
  stop("rhs_sus_num contains NA/NaN/Inf.")
}
if (any(is.na(objective_cost) | is.nan(objective_cost) | is.infinite(objective_cost))) {
  stop("objective_cost contains NA/NaN/Inf.")
}

sol_s1_cafe3 <- lp(
  direction = "min",
  objective.in = objective_cost,
  const.mat = A_sus_num,
  const.dir = dir_sus_chr,
  const.rhs = rhs_sus_num,
  all.int = TRUE
)

if (sol_s1_cafe3$status != 0) {
  stop("s1_cafe3 infeasible. Try relaxing bounds or checking baseline sustainable spend.")
}

x_s1_cafe3 <- sol_s1_cafe3$solution
```

# Part 5: Report

```{r}
# =========================================================
# BUILD REPORT OBJECTS
# =========================================================

report_objs_cafe3 <- build_scenario_report_objects(
  opt_df = optimization_data_cafe3,
  scenario_list = list(
    s1_cafe3 = x_s1_cafe3,
    s6_cafe3 = x_s6_cafe3
  )
)

# =========================================================
# EXTRACT OUTPUT TABLES
# =========================================================

ingredient_level_data <- report_objs_cafe3$ingredient_level_data
scenario_summary <- report_objs_cafe3$scenario_summary
category_frequency <- report_objs_cafe3$category_frequency
category_sustainability <- report_objs_cafe3$category_sustainability
ingredient_details_s1_cafe3 <- report_objs_cafe3$ingredient_details$s1_cafe3

# =========================================================
# PRINT HEADLINE METRICS
# =========================================================

print(scenario_summary)

baseline_row <- scenario_summary %>% filter(scenario == "baseline")
s1_row <- scenario_summary %>% filter(scenario == "s1_cafe3")

headline_s6 <- make_headline_metrics(report_objs_cafe3, "s6_cafe3")
headline_s6

cat("\n")
cat("Baseline cost: ", round(baseline_row$total_cost, 2), "\n", sep = "")
cat("Optimized cost (s1_cafe3): ", round(s1_row$total_cost, 2), "\n", sep = "")
cat("Percent cost change: ", round(s1_row$cost_pct_change, 2), "%\n", sep = "")
cat("Baseline sustainable spend: ", round(baseline_row$sus_spend, 2), "\n", sep = "")
cat("Optimized sustainable spend: ", round(s1_row$sus_spend, 2), "\n", sep = "")
cat("Percent sustainable spend change: ", round(s1_row$sus_spend_pct_change, 2), "%\n", sep = "")
cat("Baseline sustainable pct: ", round(100 * baseline_row$sus_pct, 2), "%\n", sep = "")
cat("Optimized sustainable pct: ", round(100 * s1_row$sus_pct, 2), "%\n", sep = "")
cat("Percent sustainable pct change: ", round(s1_row$sus_pct_pct_change, 2), "%\n", sep = "")
cat("Baseline GHG: ", round(baseline_row$total_ghg, 2), "\n", sep = "")
cat("Optimized GHG: ", round(s1_row$total_ghg, 2), "\n", sep = "")
cat("Percent GHG change: ", round(s1_row$ghg_pct_change, 2), "%\n", sep = "")

deliverable_category_s6 <- make_deliverable_category_table(report_objs_cafe3, "s6_cafe3")
deliverable_category_s6

scenario_text_s6 <- make_scenario_narrative(
  report_objs_cafe3,
  "s6_cafe3",
  dining_name = "Cafe 3"
)

cat(scenario_text_s6)

# =========================================================
# WRITE CSV OUTPUTS
# =========================================================

write_csv(ingredient_level_data, file.path(output_dir, "ingredient_level_data_with_scenarios.csv"))
write_csv(scenario_summary, file.path(output_dir, "scenario_summary.csv"))
write_csv(category_frequency, file.path(output_dir, "category_frequency_summary.csv"))
write_csv(category_sustainability, file.path(output_dir, "category_sustainability_summary.csv"))
write_csv(ingredient_details_s1_cafe3, file.path(output_dir, "ingredient_details_s1_cafe3.csv"))

# =========================================================
# SAVE PLOTS
# =========================================================

p1 <- report_objs_cafe3$plots$s1_cafe3$category_frequency
p2 <- report_objs_cafe3$plots$s1_cafe3$category_share_change
p3 <- report_objs_cafe3$plots$s1_cafe3$sustainability_pct
p4 <- report_objs_cafe3$plots$s1_cafe3$sus_vs_conv_spend

save_plot(p1, "plot_category_frequency_s1_cafe3.png")
save_plot(p2, "plot_category_share_change_s1_cafe3.png")
save_plot(p3, "plot_sustainability_pct_s1_cafe3.png")
save_plot(p4, "plot_sus_vs_conv_spend_s1_cafe3.png", width = 9, height = 6)

# =========================================================
# OPTIONAL: DISPLAY PLOTS IN SESSION
# =========================================================

print(p1)
print(p2)
print(p3)
print(p4)
```
